text: What is the SI unit of force?
subject: Physics
explanation: Force is measured in Newtons (N) in the SI system.

text: Calculate the acceleration if force is 10N and mass is 2kg.
subject: Physics
correctAnswer: Using F = ma, a = F/m = 10/2 = 5 m/s²
